meta.title: Yasin Kaan Yiğit — Full-Stack & Mobile Engineer
meta.description: A software engineer designing and building refined mobile and web experiences end-to-end, with performant systems and clean interfaces.

hero.summary: I build mobile apps with Flutter, modern web interfaces with Next.js and React, and scalable backend services with Node.js, PostgreSQL and Docker. End-to-end product experience across AI products, legaltech platforms, marketplaces, and coaching solutions.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: I build mobile apps with Flutter, modern web interfaces with Next.js and React, and scalable backend services with Node.js, PostgreSQL and Docker. I treat software as a product to keep refining, not a deliverable to ship and forget.
about.paragraph2: I've shipped AI-powered products, legaltech platforms, marketplaces, and coaching tools end-to-end. I enjoy thinking across the full stack — from architecture down to interface details.

ege.description: Core undergraduate program focused on analytical thinking, problem solving, and mathematical modeling.

istanbul.description: Hands-on program covering data structures, algorithms, and modern software development practices.

lawantra.title: Software Developer
descriptionParagraphs: Building product features across web, backend, and mobile for a legaltech platform with Next.js, Node.js, Firebase, REST APIs, and Flutter.
Designing end-to-end flows for AI-assisted legal workflows, secure document processes, KVKK-compliant data privacy, and automation tools for lawyers.
Contributing to mobile development, frontend architecture, backend integrations, and continuous improvement of the live web platform.

appgamedo.title: Software Developer
descriptionParagraphs: Building coach discovery, secure messaging, scheduling, video sessions, personalized recommendations, and multilingual product flows on Coachun.
Directly contributing to growth of a product serving 100+ coaches and 200+ active users.
Working across mobile, frontend, backend, and database layers — keeping performance and user experience first.

freelance.title: Freelance Software Developer
descriptionParagraphs: Built 10+ mobile apps with Flutter, Dart, Firebase, REST APIs, BLoC, and MVC.
Shipped products across marketplaces, health, accessibility, coaching, AI productivity, and legaltech.
Owned authentication, Firestore data modeling, real-time messaging, push notifications, REST API integrations, and store release pipelines end-to-end.

yandex.title: Search Engine Quality Development Specialist
descriptionParagraphs: Analyzed search result quality, relevance, query intent, and guideline alignment through systematic QA processes.
Provided data-driven feedback and product recommendations to improve search experience and result quality.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.subtitle: A selection of products I've built end-to-end — from design to delivery.

lawantra.title: Lawantra · AI Legaltech Platform
lawantra.description: An active legaltech platform with document automation, secure workflows, AI-assisted legal operations, and connected mobile flows.

dreeys.title: Dreeys AI · Goal Tracker & Coach
dreeys.description: AI-powered goal tracking and coaching app with tasks, habits, reminders, focus sessions, rewards, Apple Sign In, IAP, and 7-language support.

coachun.title: Coachun · Coaching Platform
coachun.description: Coaching platform serving 100+ coaches and 200+ users — discovery, secure messaging, scheduling, video, and personalized recommendations.

ppazar.title: ppazar · Listings & Trade
ppazar.description: Cross-platform marketplace with real-time buyer–seller messaging, AI-assisted vehicle suggestions, EIDS-verified listings, and multi-store releases.

spory.title: Spory · Health & Activity
spory.description: Health and activity app with personalized plan flows, BLoC-based state management, and Firebase integration.

harmopy.title: Harmopy · AI Personal Growth
harmopy.description: Personal growth web platform with 50+ AI coaches, personalized goals, inspiring content, and emotional state tracking.

accessible.title: Accessible Route
accessible.description: Accessible route and venue discovery app for people with disabilities, built with Flutter and the Google Maps API.
